verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus ipsi David.   Noli æmulari in malignantibus,  neque zelaveris facientes iniquitatem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָוִ֨ד ׀ אַל־תִּתְחַ֥ר בַּמְּרֵעִ֑ים אַל־תְּ֝קַנֵּ֗א בְּעֹשֵׂ֥י עַוְלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Fret not thyself because of evildoers, neither be thou envious against the workers of iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam tamquam fœnum velociter arescent,  et quemadmodum olera herbarum cito decident.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י כֶ֭חָצִיר מְהֵרָ֣ה יִמָּ֑לוּ וּכְיֶ֥רֶק דֶּ֝֗שֶׁא יִבּוֹלֽוּן׃
verses.king_james: For they shall soon be cut down like the grass, and wither as the green herb.

verses.latin_vulgate: Spera in Domino, et fac bonitatem ;  et inhabita terram, et pasceris in divitiis ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּטַ֣ח בַּ֭יהֹוָה וַעֲשֵׂה־ט֑וֹב שְׁכׇן־אֶ֝֗רֶץ וּרְעֵ֥ה אֱמוּנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Trust in the Lord, and do good; so shalt thou dwell in the land, and verily thou shalt be fed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Delectare in Domino,  et dabit tibi petitiones cordis tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִתְעַנַּ֥ג עַל־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְיִֽתֶּן־לְ֝ךָ֗ מִשְׁאֲלֹ֥ת לִבֶּֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Delight thyself also in the Lord; and he shall give thee the desires of thine heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Revela Domino viam tuam,  et spera in eo, et ipse faciet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גּ֣וֹל עַל־יְהֹוָ֣ה דַּרְכֶּ֑ךָ וּבְטַ֥ח עָ֝לָ֗יו וְה֣וּא יַעֲשֶֽׂה׃
verses.king_james: Commit thy way unto the Lord; trust also in him; and he shall bring it to pass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et educet quasi lumen justitiam tuam,  et judicium tuum tamquam meridiem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהוֹצִ֣יא כָא֣וֹר צִדְקֶ֑ךָ וּ֝מִשְׁפָּטֶ֗ךָ כַּֽצׇּהֳרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And he shall bring forth thy righteousness as the light, and thy judgment as the noonday.

verses.latin_vulgate: Subditus esto Domino, et ora eum.  Noli æmulari in eo qui prosperatur in via sua ;  in homine faciente injustitias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דּ֤וֹם ׀ לַיהֹוָה֮ וְהִתְח֢וֹלֵֽ֫ל ל֥וֹ אַל־תִּ֭תְחַר בְּמַצְלִ֣יחַ דַּרְכּ֑וֹ בְּ֝אִ֗ישׁ עֹשֶׂ֥ה מְזִמּֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Rest in the Lord, and wait patiently for him: fret not thyself because of him who prospereth in his way, because of the man who bringeth wicked devices to pass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Desine ab ira, et derelinque furorem ;  noli æmulari ut maligneris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֶ֣רֶף מֵ֭אַף וַעֲזֹ֣ב חֵמָ֑ה אַל־תִּ֝תְחַ֗ר אַךְ־לְהָרֵֽעַ׃
verses.king_james: Cease from anger, and forsake wrath: fret not thyself in any wise to do evil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam qui malignantur exterminabuntur ;  sustinentes autem Dominum, ipsi hæreditabunt terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־מְ֭רֵעִים יִכָּרֵת֑וּן וְקֹוֵ֥י יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה הֵ֣מָּה יִֽירְשׁוּ־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: For evildoers shall be cut off: but those that wait upon the Lord, they shall inherit the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adhuc pusillum, et non erit peccator ;  et quæres locum ejus, et non invenies.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְע֣וֹד מְ֭עַט וְאֵ֣ין רָשָׁ֑ע וְהִתְבּוֹנַ֖נְתָּ עַל־מְקוֹמ֣וֹ וְאֵינֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: For yet a little while, and the wicked shall not be: yea, thou shalt diligently consider his place, and it shall not be.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mansueti autem hæreditabunt terram,  et delectabuntur in multitudine pacis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲנָוִ֥ים יִֽירְשׁוּ־אָ֑רֶץ וְ֝הִֽתְעַנְּג֗וּ עַל־רֹ֥ב שָׁלֽוֹם׃
verses.king_james: But the meek shall inherit the earth; and shall delight themselves in the abundance of peace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Observabit peccator justum,  et stridebit super eum dentibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹמֵ֣ם רָ֭שָׁע לַצַּדִּ֑יק וְחֹרֵ֖ק עָלָ֣יו שִׁנָּֽיו׃
verses.king_james: The wicked plotteth against the just, and gnasheth upon him with his teeth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus autem irridebit eum,  quoniam prospicit quod veniet dies ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲדֹנָ֥י יִשְׂחַק־ל֑וֹ כִּי־רָ֝אָ֗ה כִּֽי־יָבֹ֥א יוֹמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord shall laugh at him: for he seeth that his day is coming.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gladium evaginaverunt peccatores ;  intenderunt arcum suum :  ut dejiciant pauperem et inopem,  ut trucident rectos corde.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶ֤רֶב ׀ פָּ֥תְח֣וּ רְשָׁעִים֮ וְדָרְכ֢וּ קַ֫שְׁתָּ֥ם לְ֭הַפִּיל עָנִ֣י וְאֶבְי֑וֹן לִ֝טְב֗וֹחַ יִשְׁרֵי־דָֽרֶךְ׃
verses.king_james: The wicked have drawn out the sword, and have bent their bow, to cast down the poor and needy, and to slay such as be of upright conversation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gladius eorum intret in corda ipsorum,  et arcus eorum confringatur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַ֭רְבָּם תָּב֣וֹא בְלִבָּ֑ם וְ֝קַשְּׁתוֹתָ֗ם תִּשָּׁבַֽרְנָה׃
verses.king_james: Their sword shall enter into their own heart, and their bows shall be broken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Melius est modicum justo,  super divitias peccatorum multas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טוֹב־מְ֭עַט לַצַּדִּ֑יק מֵ֝הֲמ֗וֹן רְשָׁעִ֥ים רַבִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: A little that a righteous man hath is better than the riches of many wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam brachia peccatorum conterentur :  confirmat autem justos Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י זְרוֹע֣וֹת רְ֭שָׁעִים תִּשָּׁבַ֑רְנָה וְסוֹמֵ֖ךְ צַדִּיקִ֣ים יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For the arms of the wicked shall be broken: but the Lord upholdeth the righteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Novit Dominus dies immaculatorum,  et hæreditas eorum in æternum erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹדֵ֣עַ יְ֭הֹוָה יְמֵ֣י תְמִימִ֑ם וְ֝נַחֲלָתָ֗ם לְעוֹלָ֥ם תִּהְיֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: The Lord knoweth the days of the upright: and their inheritance shall be for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non confundentur in tempore malo,  et in diebus famis saturabuntur :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־יֵ֭בֹשׁוּ בְּעֵ֣ת רָעָ֑ה וּבִימֵ֖י רְעָב֣וֹן יִשְׂבָּֽעוּ׃
verses.king_james: They shall not be ashamed in the evil time: and in the days of famine they shall be satisfied.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia peccatores peribunt.  Inimici vero Domini mox ut honorificati fuerint et exaltati,  deficientes quemadmodum fumus deficient.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י רְשָׁעִ֨ים ׀ יֹאבֵ֗דוּ וְאֹיְבֵ֣י יְ֭הֹוָה כִּיקַ֣ר כָּרִ֑ים כָּל֖וּ בֶעָשָׁ֣ן כָּֽלוּ׃
verses.king_james: But the wicked shall perish, and the enemies of the Lord shall be as the fat of lambs: they shall consume; into smoke shall they consume away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mutuabitur peccator, et non solvet ;  justus autem miseretur et tribuet :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹוֶ֣ה רָ֭שָׁע וְלֹ֣א יְשַׁלֵּ֑ם וְ֝צַדִּ֗יק חוֹנֵ֥ן וְנוֹתֵֽן׃
verses.king_james: The wicked borroweth, and payeth not again: but the righteous sheweth mercy, and giveth.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia benedicentes ei hæreditabunt terram ;  maledicentes autem ei disperibunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י מְ֭בֹרָכָיו יִ֣ירְשׁוּ אָ֑רֶץ וּ֝מְקֻלָּלָ֗יו יִכָּרֵֽתוּ׃
verses.king_james: For such as be blessed of him shall inherit the earth; and they that be cursed of him shall be cut off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Apud Dominum gressus hominis dirigentur,  et viam ejus volet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵ֭יְהֹוָה מִֽצְעֲדֵי־גֶ֥בֶר כּוֹנָ֗נוּ וְדַרְכּ֥וֹ יֶחְפָּֽץ׃
verses.king_james: The steps of a good man are ordered by the Lord: and he delighteth in his way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum ceciderit, non collidetur,  quia Dominus supponit manum suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יִפֹּ֥ל לֹֽא־יוּטָ֑ל כִּֽי־יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה סוֹמֵ֥ךְ יָדֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down: for the Lord upholdeth him with his hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Junior fui, etenim senui ;  et non vidi justum derelictum,  nec semen ejus quærens panem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נַ֤עַר ׀ הָיִ֗יתִי גַּם־זָ֫קַ֥נְתִּי וְֽלֹא־רָ֭אִיתִי צַדִּ֣יק נֶעֱזָ֑ב וְ֝זַרְע֗וֹ מְבַקֶּשׁ־לָֽחֶם׃
verses.king_james: I have been young, and now am old; yet have I not seen the righteous forsaken, nor his seed begging bread.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tota die miseretur et commodat ;  et semen illius in benedictione erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־הַ֭יּוֹם חוֹנֵ֣ן וּמַלְוֶ֑ה וְ֝זַרְע֗וֹ לִבְרָכָֽה׃
verses.king_james: He is ever merciful, and lendeth; and his seed is blessed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Declina a malo, et fac bonum,  et inhabita in sæculum sæculi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ס֣וּר מֵ֭רָע וַעֲשֵׂה־ט֗וֹב וּשְׁכֹ֥ן לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Depart from evil, and do good; and dwell for evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia Dominus amat judicium,  et non derelinquet sanctos suos :  in æternum conservabuntur.  Injusti punientur,  et semen impiorum peribit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ אֹ֘הֵ֤ב מִשְׁפָּ֗ט וְלֹא־יַעֲזֹ֣ב אֶת־חֲ֭סִידָיו לְעוֹלָ֣ם נִשְׁמָ֑רוּ וְזֶ֖רַע רְשָׁעִ֣ים נִכְרָֽת׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord loveth judgment, and forsaketh not his saints; they are preserved for ever: but the seed of the wicked shall be cut off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justi autem hæreditabunt terram,  et inhabitabunt in sæculum sæculi super eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַדִּיקִ֥ים יִֽירְשׁוּ־אָ֑רֶץ וְיִשְׁכְּנ֖וּ לָעַ֣ד עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: The righteous shall inherit the land, and dwell therein for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os justi meditabitur sapientiam,  et lingua ejus loquetur judicium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּֽי־צַ֭דִּיק יֶהְגֶּ֣ה חׇכְמָ֑ה וּ֝לְשׁוֹנ֗וֹ תְּדַבֵּ֥ר מִשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.king_james: The mouth of the righteous speaketh wisdom, and his tongue talketh of judgment.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lex Dei ejus in corde ipsius,  et non supplantabuntur gressus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹרַ֣ת אֱלֹהָ֣יו בְּלִבּ֑וֹ לֹ֖א תִמְעַ֣ד אֲשֻׁרָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: The law of his God is in his heart; none of his steps shall slide.

verses.latin_vulgate: Considerat peccator justum,  et quærit mortificare eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צוֹפֶ֣ה רָ֭שָׁע לַצַּדִּ֑יק וּ֝מְבַקֵּ֗שׁ לַהֲמִיתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The wicked watcheth the righteous, and seeketh to slay him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus autem non derelinquet eum in manibus ejus,  nec damnabit eum cum judicabitur illi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְ֭הֹוָה לֹא־יַעַזְבֶ֣נּוּ בְיָד֑וֹ וְלֹ֥א יַ֝רְשִׁיעֶ֗נּוּ בְּהִשָּׁפְטֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The Lord will not leave him in his hand, nor condemn him when he is judged.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exspecta Dominum, et custodi viam ejus,  et exaltabit te ut hæreditate capias terram :  cum perierint peccatores, videbis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קַוֵּ֤ה אֶל־יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ וּשְׁמֹ֬ר דַּרְכּ֗וֹ וִֽ֭ירוֹמִמְךָ לָרֶ֣שֶׁת אָ֑רֶץ בְּהִכָּרֵ֖ת רְשָׁעִ֣ים תִּרְאֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: Wait on the Lord, and keep his way, and he shall exalt thee to inherit the land: when the wicked are cut off, thou shalt see it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vidi impium superexaltatum,  et elevatum sicut cedros Libani :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָ֭אִיתִי רָשָׁ֣ע עָרִ֑יץ וּ֝מִתְעָרֶ֗ה כְּאֶזְרָ֥ח רַעֲנָֽן׃
verses.king_james: I have seen the wicked in great power, and spreading himself like a green bay tree.

verses.latin_vulgate: et transivi, et ecce non erat ;  et quæsivi eum, et non est inventus locus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽ֭יַּעֲבֹר וְהִנֵּ֣ה אֵינֶ֑נּוּ וָ֝אֲבַקְשֵׁ֗הוּ וְלֹ֣א נִמְצָֽא׃
verses.king_james: Yet he passed away, and, lo, he was not: yea, I sought him, but he could not be found.

verses.latin_vulgate: Custodi innocentiam, et vide æquitatem,  quoniam sunt reliquiæ homini pacifico.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁמׇר־תָּ֭ם וּרְאֵ֣ה יָשָׁ֑ר כִּֽי־אַחֲרִ֖ית לְאִ֣ישׁ שָׁלֽוֹם׃
verses.king_james: Mark the perfect man, and behold the upright: for the end of that man is peace.

verses.latin_vulgate: Injusti autem disperibunt simul ;  reliquiæ impiorum interibunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּֽ֭פֹשְׁעִים נִשְׁמְד֣וּ יַחְדָּ֑ו אַחֲרִ֖ית רְשָׁעִ֣ים נִכְרָֽתָה׃
verses.king_james: But the transgressors shall be destroyed together: the end of the wicked shall be cut off.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salus autem justorum a Domino ;  et protector eorum in tempore tribulationis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּתְשׁוּעַ֣ת צַ֭דִּיקִים מֵיְהֹוָ֑ה מָ֝עוּזָּ֗ם בְּעֵ֣ת צָרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: But the salvation of the righteous is of the Lord: he is their strength in the time of trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adjuvabit eos Dominus, et liberabit eos ;  et eruet eos a peccatoribus, et salvabit eos,  quia speraverunt in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֥יַּעְזְרֵ֥ם יְהֹוָ֗ה וַֽיְפַ֫לְּטֵ֥ם יְפַלְּטֵ֣ם מֵ֭רְשָׁעִים וְיוֹשִׁיעֵ֑ם כִּי־חָ֥סוּ בֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And the Lord shall help them, and deliver them: he shall deliver them from the wicked, and save them, because they trust in him.
